title: Floating jellyfish

The '''Floating jellyfish''' were native to the terrestrial planet [[Baskarn]]. They were great [[Jellyfish/Legends|jellyfish]]-like creatures, nearly a hundred [[Meter/Legends|meters]] across, that used lighter-than-air [[Gas/Legends|gases]] to float across the skies above the planet’s extremely thick and deadly [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]]. White and almost translucent, they fed on the small [[Bird/Legends|birds]] and [[Rodent/Legends|rodents]] that lived in the tops of the [[Tree/Legends|trees]], ensnaring them with huge, pale tentacles that dangled among the branches. They could be dangerous to tree climbers as well as hazardous to [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] or even [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], which might collide with them by accident.<ref name="WY" />

The locals of Baskarn sometimes climbed trees in search of food and waited for one of the great floating jellyfish to drift by. They carefully avoided its dangling tentacles so as not to be stunned by its [[Poison/Legends|poison]]. Those with quick reflexes were able to steal a bird or a rodent from the jellyfish’s clutches, already incapacitated by its venom.<ref name="WY" />

==Behind the scenes==
The floating jellyfish was first mentioned in "[[The Way of the Yrashu]]," an adventure for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Dustin Browder]] that was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]] in [[May]] [[1994]].
